title: bytedance/deer-flow
friendlyTitle: A long-running AI agent framework from ByteDance
summary: ByteDance’s DeerFlow is an open-source long-horizon agent harness for research, coding, creation, and multi-step workflows. Version 2.0 combines sub-agents, memory, sandboxes, tools, skills, workspaces, and message-gateway concepts for tasks that may run minutes to hours.
friendlySummary: DeerFlow is an open-source project for agents that can research, code, use tools, and work on longer tasks.
whyItMatters: Developers can study or run DeerFlow to understand how modern agent systems coordinate tools, memories, sub-agents, and execution environments. It is a useful reference for teams building deep-research agents, workflow automations, or supervised long-running AI workers.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It is useful for developers who want to learn how bigger agent systems are put together.
